hero.tagline: Transform Your Life Through the Ancient Science of Yoga
hero.subtagline: Expert guidance in Hatha, Vinyasa & Pranayama. Batches for all levels, all ages.

about.heading: About the School
about.schoolDesc: Nibedita Yoga Training Centre has been a sanctuary for sincere practitioners since its founding. Rooted in classical yoga tradition and informed by modern understanding, we offer a complete path — from beginner asana to advanced pranayama, philosophy, and meditation.
about.teacherBio: With years of dedicated practice and teaching, Rekha Nath brings deep grounding in the classical yoga tradition alongside a warm, accessible teaching style. Her teaching draws on the full breadth of the yoga tradition, making it approachable for students of all ages and backgrounds.

contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.subheading: Have a question? Want to visit? Send us a message and we'll respond within 24 hours.
